title: what I eat in a week | simple & balanced recipes
description:
Hi loves, hope you're all having a nice day✨ I've been wanting to film a What I Eat in a Week video for so long, and I finally made it happen! A lot of you have asked for more recipes in my vlogs, so I hope you find some new favorites to try hehe. I also wanted to make it a bit more fun by sharing snippets of my week... working, meeting friends and exercising! Hope you enjoy the video, and if you do, let me know in the comments! I appreciate you all so much, and I'll see you next week xx

Instag
